name: Neal Brennan
bio: Neal Brennan is an American comedian, writer, and director best known for co-creating and co-writing Chappelle's Show with Dave Chappelle. As a stand-up he is known for confessional, structurally inventive work, most notably the Netflix special 3 Mics, in which he alternates between one-liners, traditional stand-up, and candid material about depression. He has followed it with the Netflix specials Blocks and Crazy Good.

timeline.ev: Co-writes the film Half Baked with Dave Chappelle
Chappelle's Show premieres on Comedy Central
Stages 3 Mics off-Broadway in New York
3 Mics released as a Netflix special
Netflix special Blocks, from his one-man show Unacceptable

accolades: Three-time Emmy nominee for Chappelle's Show
Acclaimed for 3 Mics, a genre-blending solo show
Directed Seth Meyers: Lobby Baby for Netflix
